message:
fix(core): commit untracked gc.rs and bench files referenced by lib.rs and Cargo.toml

These source files were created by other agents but never added to git.
Without them, a clean checkout fails cargo check because lib.rs declares
`pub mod gc;` and Cargo.toml declares [[bench]] entries for cache_gc and
caut_quota_scheduling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
